title: All Numbers
description: Extracts all numbers including decimals (e.g. 42, 3.14)

title: Integers Only
description: Extracts whole numbers only, no decimals

title: Currency Amount
description: Extracts currency amounts like $1,234.56 or €99.99

title: Percentage
description: Extracts percentage values like 45% or 99.9%

title: Email Address
description: Extracts email addresses like user@example.com

title: US Phone Number
description: Extracts US phone numbers like (555) 123-4567 or 555.123.4567

title: US Zip Code
description: Extracts US zip codes like 12345 or 12345-6789

title: URL
description: Extracts URLs starting with http:// or https://

title: Domain Name
description: Extracts domain names like example.com

title: Host Domain from URL
description: Extracts the host domain from URLs, stripping protocol and www prefix

title: Amazon ASIN
description: Extracts Amazon ASIN product code (e.g. B0CX23V2ZK) from URLs like /dp/B0CX23V2ZK

title: Flipkart Product ID
description: Extracts Flipkart product ID from URLs like /p/itmXXXXXXXX

title: eBay Item ID
description: Extracts eBay item ID from URLs like /itm/item-title/123456789

title: Walmart Item ID
description: Extracts Walmart item ID from URLs like /ip/Product-Name/123456789

title: AliExpress Item ID
description: Extracts AliExpress item ID from URLs like /item/1234567890.html

title: Etsy Listing ID
description: Extracts Etsy listing ID from URLs like /listing/1234567890/

title: Home Depot Item ID
description: Extracts Home Depot item ID from URLs like /p/Product-Name/306248639

title: Best Buy SKU
description: Extracts Best Buy SKU from URLs like /site/product-name/6541234.p

title: Target Item ID
description: Extracts Target item ID from URLs like /p/product-name/-/A-12345678

title: Shopify Product Handle
description: Extracts Shopify product handle/slug from URLs like /products/my-product-name

title: YouTube Video ID
description: Extracts YouTube video ID from URLs like youtube.com/watch?v=dQw4w9WgXcQ or youtu.be/dQw4w9WgXcQ

title: ASIN / SKU (Generic)
description: Generic extraction of uppercase alphanumeric product codes (8-12 chars) from URL paths or query params

title: IPv4 Address
description: Extracts IPv4 addresses like 192.168.1.1

title: ISO Date
description: Extracts ISO dates like 2024-01-31

title: Date (slash)
description: Extracts slash-separated dates like 01/31/2024 or 1/3/24

title: Time (HH:MM:SS)
description: Extracts time values like 14:30 or 14:30:59

title: All Text (Words)
description: Extracts all alphabetic words, stripping numbers and symbols

title: Hex Color
description: Extracts hex color codes like #FF5733 or #abc

title: Quoted String
description: Extracts text between single or double quotes

title: Text in Parentheses
description: Extracts text between parentheses

title: First Word
description: Extracts the first word from each value

title: Last Word
description: Extracts the last word from each value
